value.found_quote: We’re exploring an easy way for developers to use MCP (Model Context Protocol) to build their own search connectors, which can connect directly to deep research today, and will support other use cases in the future.
value.rationale: The page is OpenAI's MCP Connector Interest Form, which describes MCP connectors built using the Model Context Protocol. It explicitly states OpenAI is "exploring" this capability and invites developers to complete an interest form to be notified "when submissions open," indicating an early/preview stage rather than general availability.
